conservative.name: Devastate Senses
conservative.requirements:
6 power
Target within medium range. I you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: All the target's weaknesses and fears burst to the surface! For each characteristic that is less than 3, the target suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue
As above, and for each characteristic that is less than 2, the target suffers 1 additional stress and 1 additional fatigue

boon.description: All of the target's characteristics are reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 1) until your next turn

sigmarsComet.description: As your target seems weaker, you seem stronger. You may recover 1 stress for each stress the target suffers, and 1 fatigue for each fatigue the target suffers

reckless.name: Devastate Senses
reckless.requirements:
5 power per target
Targets within medium range. For each target beyond the first, add K to the dice pool

success.description: All the target's weaknesses and fears burst to the surface! For each characteristic that is less than 3, the target suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue
As above, and for each characteristic that is less than 2, the target suffers 1 additional stress and 1 additional fatigue

boon.description: All enemies within medium range suffer 1 stress
All enemies within medium range suffer 1 fatigue

sigmarsComet.description: All enemies within medium range suffer 1 stress and 1 fatigue
